name: autonomous-ai-agents
description: Claude Code's on-ramp to Jack's fleet-coordination primitives. v0.1: fleet-identity skill (who runs Wings/Zoe/Mara/Kopi). v0.2: Hermes (Wings) messaging bridge via 'hermes mcp serve' (10 tools) + hermes-bridge skill. v0.3: OpenClaw (Zolivier/Zoe) messaging bridge via 'openclaw mcp serve' (9 tools) + openclaw-bridge skill (with Klawz security disclosure). Wings + Zoe are the fleet's shared async-messaging substrate; this plugin wires Claude Code's side of both halves.

hermes.description: Nous Research Hermes Agent messaging bridge — async-messaging substrate across Telegram/Discord/Slack/WhatsApp/Signal/Matrix. Exposes conversations_list, conversation_get, messages_read, messages_send, attachments_fetch, channels_list, events_poll, events_wait, permissions_list_open, permissions_respond. Requires `hermes` CLI on PATH (install: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com).

openclaw.description: OpenClaw gateway messaging bridge (Zolivier/Zoe runtime). Async-messaging substrate via Jack's local OpenClaw gateway — Discord, Telegram, Slack on Zolivier-managed channels. 9 tools: conversations_list, conversation_get, messages_read, messages_send, attachments_fetch, events_poll, events_wait, permissions_list_open, permissions_respond. Requires `openclaw` CLI on PATH (install: brew install openclaw, then run gateway via launchd plist `ai.openclaw.gateway`). See companion skill openclaw-bridge for Klawz security boundaries.
